mapper.sql: id, recipient_id, title, content, business_type, business_id, source_event_id, read_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET read_at = CASE WHEN read_at IS NULL THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE read_at END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND recipient_id = #{recipientId}
UPDATE message SET read_at = CASE WHEN read_at IS NULL THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE read_at END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND read_at IS NULL
